description_long: This object consists of two stacked slices of toasted bread, each topped with a cooked sunny-side-up egg. The bread has a golden-brown crust and a lighter, slightly yellowish interior, suggesting it is well-toasted. The eggs feature a bright yellow yolk centered within a white, slightly glossy egg white, giving a realistic appearance of freshly cooked eggs. The edges of the bread are slightly irregular, mimicking the natural shape of hand-sliced bread. The surface texture of the bread appears matte and slightly rough, while the egg whites are smoother and more reflective. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or additional toppings present.
description: Two slices of toasted bread, each topped with a sunny-side-up egg, featuring golden-brown crusts and bright yellow yolks. The bread appears matte and rough, while the eggs are smooth and glossy.
description_view_0: This view shows the bread and eggs from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the layered structure and the central placement of the egg yolks.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the front edge of the bread stack, with the egg yolks appearing more oval and the crust edges more pronounced.
description_view_2: Here, the bread's side is more visible, showing the thickness of the slices and the even distribution of the egg whites and yolks.
description_view_3: This view presents the bread and eggs from a rear angle, with the yolks slightly off-center and the crust edges less defined.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is a consistent golden-brown color with a slightly rough, uneven edge, typical of hand-sliced toasted bread. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring.
